title: altingia indochinensis
intro: Altingia indochinensis, also known as the Vietnamese altingia or Indochinese altingia, is a plant species belonging to the family Hamamelidaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Altingia indochinensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
